system_recommendation.executive_summary: Iran has seized two commercial vessels near the Strait of Hormuz, escalating Gulf tensions. Import-dependent economies face immediate freight and insurance cost spikes. Diversification across Gulf and non-Gulf crude sources is advised while diplomatic channels remain open.

actual_outcome.documented_response: India's MEA issued a statement monitoring the situation; no immediate supply disruption reported. Indian Navy increased patrols in the western Arabian Sea. Refiners began reviewing alternate crude slates.
